case_title: ELIZABETH ANN JOLIVET VS. LARKIN STREET YOUTH SERVICES ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, CONSOLIDATES CASE CGC-23-609830 (JOLIVET V. LARKIN STREET YOUTH SERVICES) WITH THIS CASE. THE CGC-23-609830 CASE BEING DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE NUMBER. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR APR-11-2024, AT 9:00 AM, IN DEPT. 304. THE MAY-22-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-611245 WITH CASE CGC-23-609830, ORDER; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-23-609830

NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE HELD ON APR-11-2024, IN DEPT. 304. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER RE THE CASE STATUS. THE ACTION IS CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2024, AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPT. 304, FOR A FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 304.

NOT REPORTED. THE COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-01-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 304 IS OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES BY COUNSEL. A STATUS CONFERENCE IS SET FOR OCTOBER 2, 2024 AT 11:00AM PER ORDER OF THE COURT. NOTICES SENT BY COURT. (D304)
